title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Schoolnet India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Schoolnet India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Schoolnet India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Schoolnet India:
Schoolnet India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schoolnet India!
